note: Authoritative tool list mirrors src/mcp.ts (TOOLS array). Every field here was read from the source, not invented.

tools.name: bebop_boot
tools.description: Run the guard-OS self-certification. Returns whether the gates deny on red and pass on green. Refuses to lie.

tools.name: bebop_recall
tools.description: Associative recall from Bebop living memory (Vector Symbolic Architecture). Returns nearest concepts. NOTE: the VSA embedding retriever is NOT bundled; recall is in-process living memory only.

tools.name: bebop_remember
tools.description: Write a concept into living memory. Returns the memory id.

tools.name: bebop_govern
tools.description: Run the math-proven telemetry governor over a quality stream (0..1). Returns per-step authority, factor health, resonance risk, anomalies.

tools.name: bebop_route
tools.description: Classify a task and return the cheapest-adequate backend routing decision.

tools.name: bebop_self_maintain
tools.description: Run Bebop self-maintenance (test harness + invariant check). Returns health summary.
